name: Mixed Vegetable Curry
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash all the vegetables, peeling as necessary, and cut into pieces. Set aside.
2. Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat. Add the turnips, potatoes, carrots, tomatoes, and fenugreek leaves. Stir fry until the vegetables are light brown.
3. Chop the onions finely. In a small bowl, mix together the garlic and ginger paste, ground green chillies, and salt.
4. Add the chopped onions and their mixture to the pan with the stir-fried vegetables. Cook for a few minutes until the onions are translucent and fragrant.
5. Pour in 1/2 cup hot water and bring the mixture to a simmer. Reduce heat to low and cook until the vegetables are tender and a thick gravy forms. Stir occasionally to prevent burning or mashing of the vegetables.
(Note: Compiled by I. Chaudhary)
